results.rendered_html:
anūḍha a.
1 Not borne or carried.
2 Unmarried; parivettānujo'nūḍhe jyeṣṭhe dāraparigrahāt  Ak. 
— ḍhā An unmarried woman.
Comp.
— māna a. bashful, modest.
— gamanaṃ (˚ḍhā˚) Fornication.
— bhrātṛ m. (˚ḍhā˚)
1 the brother of an unmarried woman.
2 the brother of the concubine of a king.
